title: GET_KEY_PACKAGE has no rate limit — unauthenticated enumeration of all packages
description: GET_KEY_PACKAGE in ws.rs has no rate limit and no subscription check. Any authenticated client can call it in a tight loop, fetching all key packages for any pub_id, enumerating the full user-device map, and exhausting relay DB connections under load. Compare: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE IS rate-limited. The asymmetry is a footgun: the write is protected, the read is not. Add the same rate-limit check as other read-heavy handlers.
